explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: A press release implies vendor oversight for the use of AI platforms. Additionally, a privacy policy details practices around profiling and requires explicit consent for the use of collected data, including telematics information from their app.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release from Erie Strategic Ventures provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It supports governance by implying vendor oversight for the use of AI platforms, and it supports transparency by mentioning the AI capabilities of the platform.
relevant_sources.title: Erie Strategic Ventures Invests in Atomic and Feathery (AI-Powered Data Intake)

relevant_sources.summary: The Erie Insurance Privacy Policy provides evidence for the **governance** and **privacy** pillars. This policy document supports these pillars by detailing practices around profiling and requiring explicit consent for the use of collected data, including telematics information from their app.
relevant_sources.title: Erie Insurance Privacy Policy

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.findings: A privacy policy details practices around profiling. It also requires explicit consent for the use of collected data, including telematics information from their app.
privacy.path_to_improvement: Publish AI-specific privacy impact assessments or data handling procedures.

transparency.findings: A press release mentions the AI capabilities of a platform.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release from Erie Strategic Ventures provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It supports governance by implying vendor oversight for the use of AI platforms, and it supports transparency by mentioning the AI capabilities of the platform.
relevant_sources.title: Erie Strategic Ventures Invests in Atomic and Feathery (AI-Powered Data Intake)

summary.overall_findings: Erie Insurance Group's published materials address privacy and governance through specific policy practices. A privacy policy details practices around profiling and requires explicit consent for the use of collected data, contributing to 3 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars with documented evidence. Transparency is also addressed, with a press release mentioning the AI capabilities of a platform, while another press release implies vendor oversight for the use of AI platforms. No qualifying public evidence was found for fairness, explainability, and 2 additional pillars. These findings are based on a review of 7 publicly available sources.
